# Code Anchors: Committed Queue

- `.nexus/queue/` — the committed queue surface: one folder per epic holding its human planning artifacts.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — writes the human-prose close record into the epic's committed queue entry.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — creates the queue entry and seeds it with the epic artifact.
